Package jsim

Class PhysicsWorld

java.lang.Object
jsim.PhysicsWorld
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class PhysicsWorld extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Thin Java wrapper around the native physics world implementation.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PhysicsWorld(double fixedDtSeconds, boolean enableGravity)
    Creates a native physics world.

  • Constructor Details

    • PhysicsWorld

      public PhysicsWorld(double fixedDtSeconds, boolean enableGravity)
      Creates a native physics world.
      Parameters:
      fixedDtSeconds - fixed simulation timestep in seconds
      enableGravity - whether gravity is enabled for newly created bodies

  • Method Details

    • createBody

      public PhysicsBody createBody(double massKg)
      Creates a new body with the provided mass in kilograms.
      Parameters:
      massKg - the body mass in kilograms
      Returns:
      the created body handle

    • getBodyPosition

      public Vec3 getBodyPosition(int bodyIndex)
      Gets the world position for the given body.
      Parameters:
      bodyIndex - native body index
      Returns:
      body position

    • getBodyPositionArray

      public double[] getBodyPositionArray(int bodyIndex)
      Gets the world position for the given body.
      Parameters:
      bodyIndex - native body index
      Returns:
      a length-3 array containing {x, y, z}

    • getBodyLinearVelocity

      public Vec3 getBodyLinearVelocity(int bodyIndex)
      Gets the world linear velocity for the given body.
      Parameters:
      bodyIndex - native body index
      Returns:
      body linear velocity

    • getBodyLinearVelocityArray

      public double[] getBodyLinearVelocityArray(int bodyIndex)
      Gets the world linear velocity for the given body.
      Parameters:
      bodyIndex - native body index
      Returns:
      a length-3 array containing {vx, vy, vz}

    • getBodyState13Array

      public int getBodyState13Array(double[] outState13)
      Exports full body state blocks.

      Layout per body is: [x, y, z, qw, qx, qy, qz, vx, vy, vz, wx, wy, wz].

      Parameters:
      outState13 - destination array sized for N*13 entries
      Returns:
      number of body blocks written

    • step

      public void step()
      Advances the simulation by one step.

    • step

      public void step(int steps)
      Advances the simulation by the requested number of steps.
      Parameters:
      steps - number of steps to advance

    • setGravity

      public void setGravity(Vec3 gravity)
      Applies a gravity vector to the world.
      Parameters:
      gravity - gravity vector in meters per second squared

    • setGravity

      public void setGravity(double gxMetersPerSecondSquared, double gyMetersPerSecondSquared, double gzMetersPerSecondSquared)
      Applies gravity components to the world.
      Parameters:
      gxMetersPerSecondSquared - x gravity in meters per second squared
      gyMetersPerSecondSquared - y gravity in meters per second squared
      gzMetersPerSecondSquared - z gravity in meters per second squared

    • close

      public void close()
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
